# SGH Voice

> A macOS voice-input tool designed for people who mix Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and English while they work. SGH Voice turns speech into edited text and inserts it at the active cursor.

## Current public release

- Version: 2.6.0
- Platform: macOS on Apple Silicon
- Download: https://github.com/linchichuan/sgh-voice/releases/tag/v2.6.0
- License and source: https://github.com/linchichuan/sgh-voice
- App price: free
- Cloud usage: BYOK; provider charges may apply
- Mobile status: iOS and Android are development tracks, not part of the current public macOS installer

## Product capabilities

- Mixed Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and English dictation
- Protection for Latin text, kana, URLs, code, numbers, and abbreviations during post-processing
- Direct insertion at the active cursor
- Restoration of the original clipboard after insertion
- Custom dictionary for names and domain terminology
- Verified personalization based on user-edited history
- Configurable shortcuts, push-to-talk behavior, language profiles, and AI providers
- Optional on-device speech recognition on supported Apple Silicon Macs
- Optional cloud processing through providers configured by the user

## Data handling

- Dictionary and application settings are managed on the user's device
- Local speech recognition keeps audio processing on the device
- When a cloud engine is selected, audio or text is sent to the provider selected by the user
- Shingihou does not store audio on an intermediate relay server
- Cloud data handling follows the selected provider's terms and privacy policy

## Important limitations

- Recognition results vary with the model, dictionary, settings, microphone, and recording environment
- Medical and technical modes are input aids; they do not replace professional judgment or guarantee accuracy
- The current direct installer is for Apple Silicon Macs

## Company

- Shingihou Co., Ltd. / 新義豊株式会社
- Fukuoka, Japan
- Contact: info@shingihou.com
